universe.academy.title: The Quiet Academy
universe.academy.description: A compact training universe for proving that separate JSON content sets keep separate progress.
location.archive-hall.title: Archive Hall
location.archive-hall.description: Long tables, bright lamps, and books that remember who opened them.
location.sparring-court.title: Sparring Court
location.sparring-court.description: A chalk-lined court where patient drills matter more than spectacle.
location.glasshouse.title: Glasshouse
location.glasshouse.description: Silver panes shelter herbs that bloom under moonlight.
action.copy-marginalia.title: Copy Marginalia
action.copy-marginalia.description: Transcribe useful notes from the edges of older texts.
action.practice-forms.title: Practice Forms
action.practice-forms.description: Repeat clean movements until they settle into the body.
action.tend-moonvines.title: Tend Moonvines
action.tend-moonvines.description: Trim moonvines and collect viable cuttings.
skill.lore.title: Lore
skill.lore.description: Memory, myth, and the patience to connect old clues.
skill.discipline.title: Discipline
skill.discipline.description: Focus, repetition, and calm under pressure.
skill.survival.title: Survival
skill.survival.description: Practical knowledge for harsh country and stranger weather.
item.moonvine-cutting.title: Moonvine Cutting
item.moonvine-cutting.description: A viable silver-green cutting from the academy glasshouse.
